text:
There once was a little girl named Polly who had an elephant. She lived in a quiet town on the coast. Polly loved her big orange friend. She fed him peanuts every day.

One day Polly climbed onto big branches to watch the waves. In the distance she saw an owl.

The owl swooped down and tilted its head.

The little girl giggled.

The owl snatched her right feather!

She squealed.

It flew off and disappeared. Polly sighed.

She ran back to her elephant.

She jumped ontohis back.

They flew southward into the foggy night. Nothing could find them.

They found an old barn.

Old mice lived there.

Maybe the mice would scare away their enemy.

They snuggled into their beds.

Polly drifted asleep.

That night something powerful flew over them. They woke up.

It swooped again.

That evening Polly dreamt about forests.

That night big stars fell into sleep.

That summer something wonderful happened.

An owl came.

She didn
